hooks.command: $raw=[Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); $j=$raw|ConvertFrom-Json; $fp=$j.tool_input.file_path; $cmd=$j.tool_input.command; $blocked=($fp -and $fp -match [regex]::Escape('.dev.vars')) -or ($cmd -and $cmd -match [regex]::Escape('.dev.vars')); if($blocked){@{hookSpecificOutput=@{hookEventName='PreToolUse';permissionDecision='deny';permissionDecisionReason='[BLOCK] .dev.vars is a secret file. Operation cancelled.'}}|ConvertTo-Json -Compress}; exit 0
